q: Have you ever visited an art gallery?
examiner_note: Kể về một trải nghiệm cụ thể. Sử dụng 'unique atmosphere', 'showcases', 'diverse range', 'thought-provoking'.

band7.text: Yes, I’ve visited several local art galleries in my city. Each one has its own unique atmosphere and showcases a different range of artists, which I always find very interesting to explore. It’s a great way to spend a weekend afternoon.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, sử dụng từ vựng tốt (showcases, range, atmosphere).

band8.text: I certainly have. I recently visited a small gallery specializing in contemporary photography. I was struck by the raw emotional power of the images and the way the exhibition was curated to tell a compelling story. It was a very thought-provoking experience.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (specializing, contemporary, struck by, curated, compelling).

band9.text: I make a point of visiting galleries whenever I travel. One of the most memorable was a visit to the Uffizi Gallery in Florence. Standing in front of world-renowned masterpieces that I’d only seen in textbooks was a truly humbling and awe-inspiring experience that deepened my appreciation for art history.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (make a point of, world-renowned, humbling, awe-inspiring, deepened appreciation).

v.example: The museum has a fine collection of contemporary art.
She curated an exhibition of local artists.
It was a humbling experience to meet such talented people.

advanced_vocab.example: The Grand Canyon is truly awe-inspiring.

similar_questions: What is the best art exhibition you have ever seen?
Do you prefer small galleries or big museums?
